users.bio: Try the premium AeroBox mail experience

mails.subject: Welcome to AeroBox
mails.body: Welcome to AeroBox Mail. This workspace supports real-time chat, inbox/outbox/drafts, starred mail, and profile settings.
mails.preview: Welcome to AeroBox Mail. This workspace supports real-time chat, inbox/outbox/drafts, starred mail, and profile settings.
